assessor_1_raw: Retail escalation prediction: sound design with temporal split, PR-AUC, fair baseline, and comprehensive confound controls. Agent behavior analysis is thorough. Label prevalence monitoring is a good deployment check. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Well-designed escalation prediction experiment. Both models receive identical input text. Equal tuning effort with same selection criterion. Bootstrap CIs at 95% confidence. Per-agent and per-channel stratification. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly uses PR-AUC for escalation prediction. The scope is honestly bounded to the same helpdesk system. Agent ID ablation is a key confound control. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: All three assessors unanimous: defense_wins across all runs.
